title: Nursing students are applying to a job (job posting attached).
content:
Nursing students are applying to a job (job posting attached).
Provide specific feedback in the form of an email on the attached student cover letter and thank you letter based on the content of the letters – does it address the position being applied to, grammar, formatting, originality. Provide actionable and specific feedback with suggestions for improvement. Include the student's strengths. The email should be from the interim writing studio assistant to the student.

Job Posting: “
RN-2 NORTH ORTHO/TELE - Wellington Regional Medical Center

This opportunity is full time, night shift schedule.
Wellington Regional Medical Center in Wellington, Florida is a progressive acute care facility and medical center that has served Palm Beach County and the surrounding region since 1986. We are a thriving community hospital, proud to offer the "high-tech" advantages of a big-city hospital and the personalized care of a hometown provider. Wellington Regional Medical Center is a 235-bed, acute care hospital located in the beautiful Equestrian Community of Wellington, Florida.
